channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How OpenAI’s Jerry Tworek found a new way forward for large language models
item.description: The impressive intelligence gains in OpenAI’s models over time have mainly come from training them with progressively more training data, for longer amounts of time, and with massive computing power.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: How 1 man got scammed in seconds using Google
item.description: Scammers have become skilled at creating convincing fake websites that can easily fool unsuspecting users. The CyberGuy offers tips to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: YouTube’s top trends for 2024 include Bay Area creators
item.description: Online video giant YouTube has published its year-end top trends lists for 2024 and in includes Bay Area content creators.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Historic Mastodon Fossil Discovered in Upstate New York Backyard
item.description: A mastodon jaw and other bone fragments found by a homeowner in upstate New York are hailed as a significant discovery, providing valuable insights into Ice Age ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How to work with text colors on Linux
item.description: When you list files on the Linux command line, many of the file names show up in colors, as you’ve probably noticed. The colors used depend on the file types. For example, the names of directories will show up in a blue font.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Elon Musk’s Grok-2 is now free—and it’s a mess
item.description: Late Friday night, Elon Musk’s xAI opened up Grok-2 access to the masses. The model isn’t all that different from the original Grok, though the company claims it runs faster and has improved accuracy. And yet, X users have spent the weekend dunking on it.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Musk says House GOP shouldn't pass stopgap funding deal
item.description: Tech billionaire and President-elect Trump ally Elon Musk came out against a stopgap deal as he pushes for the government to reduce spending.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Why AI company Databricks just scored one of the biggest funding rounds in history
item.description: The San Francisco-based data analytics company Databricks has raised a stunning $10 billion funding round, which values the company at $62 billion and likely puts it on a path toward an IPO.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Protect Yourself Against Malicious Software and AI-Powered Scams - Tips for a Safer Online Experience
item.description: Stay safe online with our expert tips on protecting yourself against malicious software and AI-powered scams. Learn how to safeguard your personal data, detect phishing attempts, and more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump hosts Apple CEO at Mar-a-Lago as big tech leaders continue outreach to president-elect
item.description: Trump has said he has spoken with Cook about the company's long-running tax battles with the European Union.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Warning: This fake PayPal email scam is everywhere right now
item.description: Fraudsters are sending people bogus invoices through PayPal as part of a sneaky scam that is going around; here's how to protect yourself from being fooled.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Google’s Agentspace will put AI agents in the hands of workers
item.description: Google has unveiled a new tool to access AI agents that can automate workflows and help workers find information held across their organization. AI agents have become a major focus for software vendors in recent months, including Atlassian, Microsoft, Salesforce, and numerous others.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 18 indispensable Android travel apps
item.description: For all the ways travel’s evolved over the years, one thing has remained maddeningly steadfast: Moving from one place to another is almost always a hassle. There’s endless room for inconvenience and error, and a journey rarely goes according to plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, Fox 5
